home.subtitle: A modern web application powered by Nuxt 4 and Cloudflare Workers. Fast, secure, and scalable by design.

fast.title: Fast & Modern
fast.description: Built with Nuxt 4 and deployed on Cloudflare Workers for blazing fast performance.

secure.title: Secure
secure.description: Enterprise-grade security with built-in authentication and authorization.

serverless.title: Serverless
serverless.description: Powered by Cloudflare Workers for scalable, edge-first computing.

ui.title: Beautiful UI
ui.description: Stunning design with Nuxt UI components and Tailwind CSS.

openSource.title: Built in the Open
openSource.description: NuxtWorker is open source and available on GitHub. Explore the code, contribute, or use it as a starting point for your next project.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your account today.

infoBanner.title: Dashboard Preview
infoBanner.description: This is a demo dashboard. In a real application, this would display your actual account metrics, recent activities, and personalized content.

about.title: About NuxtWorker
about.subtitle: A modern web application showcasing the power of Nuxt 4 and Cloudflare Workers

template.title: Modern Full-Stack Template
template.description: NuxtWorker is a production-ready web application template that combines the best of frontend and edge computing. Built with Nuxt 4, it leverages Cloudflare Workers to deliver content at lightning speed from the edge, closest to your users.

edgePerformance.title: Edge-First Performance
edgePerformance.description: Deployed on Cloudflare's global network, your application runs at the edge for minimal latency and maximum speed.

authBuiltIn.title: Authentication Built-In
authBuiltIn.description: Includes dual authentication (credentials + GitHub OAuth) with secure session management out of the box.

d1Database.title: D1 Database Integration
d1Database.description: Seamlessly integrated with Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) and Drizzle ORM for type-safe database operations.

devExperience.title: Developer Experience
devExperience.description: Full TypeScript support, hot reload, automatic migrations, and modern tooling for an excellent DX.

startProject.title: Start Your Own Project
startProject.description: Clone this template and kickstart your next Nuxt application with authentication, D1, and edge deployment ready to go

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create an account to start building amazing things
